one_time_description: Forgiveness of First Nation negotiation support agreements loans by Government of Canada
economic_notes: COVID-19 pandemic declared March 11, 2020 with potential material impact on operations. Nation has investments in Burns Lake Native Development Corporation (62.87%), Woyenne Enterprises Ltd., Talok Fisheries Ltd., Talok Fisheries LP, Lake Babine Nation Construction Ltd., Lake Babine Nation Ventures LP, Nedut'een Development Corp, Lake Babine Nation Forestry LP, Fort Babine Lake Property Ltd., and others.
notes: Fiscal year 2020 (ended March 31, 2020). Audit is qualified because 13 government business enterprises accounted for by modified equity method did not have year-end financials completed as at March 31, 2020. Major one-time item: $12,234,102 forgiveness of negotiation support agreement loans by Government of Canada. Prior period restatement applied to 2019 figures. COVID-19 noted as subsequent event. ISC funding per reconciliation report is $15,624,822. Net debt of $1,675,298 at year end. 13 entities listed under modified equity method investment. Auditor firm name not legible in provided text.
